content_body: Summer is coming to a close, but there are still a few weeks left to take advantage of the summertime fun in the North Georgia mountains. With loads of outdoor activities in the woods, as well as in the pristine rivers and lakes, and tons of unique and quaint shops, Blue Ridge has it all. Its small town charm will have you wanting to come back again and again. But don't take our word for it—come see for yourself! Until then, check out these local summer highlights!
title: Blue Ridge Summer Highlights Video
